Class VaultHook

java.lang.Object
dev.agam.skyblockitems.integration.VaultHook
public class VaultHook extends Object
Integration hook for Vault economy. Provides safe access to economy features with fallback handling.

    • VaultHook

      public VaultHook()

  • Method Details

    • isEnabled

      public boolean isEnabled()
      Checks if Vault economy is available.
      Returns:
      true if economy is enabled

    • hasMoney

      public boolean hasMoney(org.bukkit.entity.Player player, double amount)
      Checks if a player has enough money.
      Parameters:
      player - The player to check
      amount - The amount of money required
      Returns:
      true if the player has enough money

    • takeMoney

      public boolean takeMoney(org.bukkit.entity.Player player, double amount)
      Takes money from a player's account.
      Parameters:
      player - The player to take money from
      amount - The amount to take
      Returns:
      true if the transaction was successful

    • depositMoney

      public boolean depositMoney(org.bukkit.entity.Player player, double amount)
      Gives money to a player's account.
      Parameters:
      player - The player to give money to
      amount - The amount to give
      Returns:
      true if the transaction was successful

    • getBalance

      public double getBalance(org.bukkit.entity.Player player)
      Gets a player's balance.
      Parameters:
      player - The player
      Returns:
      The player's balance, or 0 if economy is disabled

    • format

      public String format(double amount)
      Formats a money amount using the economy's currency format.
      Parameters:
      amount - The amount to format
      Returns:
      Formatted string
